item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendirian mereka bahwa hak individu penting.

notes: Agent A starts pro-society and remains broadly collectivist by the end, but visibly softens toward rights and balance after Agent B's rights-first turn. Agent B remains rights-first throughout while conceding that balance matters. Both agents engage specific claims. Turn 2 contains a non-Latin script artifact in Agent B's Indonesian text: "保障 individual rights".
